title: Freeze Cross-Lottery Feature Discovery Protocol

authorization.scope: Freeze protocol only; do not run P222; do not write DB; do not mutate registry; do not promote strategies

protocol.purpose: Freeze a future read-only P222 cross-lottery feature discovery scan that is broad, leakage-safe, and resistant to false positives.
lottery_universe: any other lottery_type present in strategy_prediction_replays
any other lottery_type surfaced by registry or related catalog data

strategy_universe.strategy_ids: all strategy_id values in replay rows
strategy_universe.bet_indexes: all bet_index values in replay rows
lifecycle_labels: any additional label encountered during the scan
strategy_universe.zero_row_and_no_data: must be reported explicitly, not dropped

rules: window set is frozen before the scan starts
no post-hoc selection of the best-looking window
optional sensitivity windows are future follow-up only
all-history cannot be the primary selector

time_stability: cross-year validation if enough data exists
special_zone: special-zone metrics may be reported separately
special-zone metrics must not affect scoring
special-zone metrics must not affect recommendation promotion

outcome_metrics: M1+ / M2+ / M3+ thresholds by lottery type where meaningful

hard_stops: repo / branch / HEAD / DB baseline diverges from Phase 0
staged files are non-empty before the run
scan requires DB write, registry write, production write, or strategy promotion
scan mixes row-level, draw-level, strategy-level, or bet-index-level metrics without labeling the unit
scan promotes special-zone results into scoring or recommendation logic
reporting_rules: separate descriptive findings from significance claims
distinguish artifact counts, replay rows, draws, strategies, and bets
state NULL honestly when evidence is null
avoid betting advice or guaranteed prediction claims
validation_gates: scan uses only frozen windows and frozen universe rules
every lifecycle label is reported as a label
zero-row / no-data strategies are reported explicitly
special-zone metrics do not affect scoring logic

required_completion_check: 測試結果 PASS / FAIL / NOT RUN
